title: Align Architecture Docs to Single Canonical Pipeline
description:
Council Review Sprint 51 Critical Task.

Problem: architecture.md describes deterministic HTN pipeline; AGENTS.md describes LLM-first pipeline; chat-system.md describes hybrid. A new developer cannot determine the authoritative pipeline.

Fix:
- Create single Mermaid diagram showing actual runtime flow as of Sprint 50
- Update architecture.md runtime flow section
- Ensure AGENTS.md and architecture.md agree
- Add note about ADR D-003 fast-paths being intentional, not drift
- Link canonical diagram from README and home.md

Source: Council Review 2026-06-26, DA-001, Human Learning Advocate findings

comments.author: anonymous
comments.body:
Council report: Data/Pages/council/audit-findings-consolidation-council-2026-06-26.md

Key fix: Human Learning Advocate found that architecture.md, AGENTS.md, and chat-system.md describe contradictory pipelines. This task creates ONE authoritative pipeline diagram and aligns all docs.
